_comment: Scripted chain scenario for the citizen tax-return US1 smoke (Epic ε #2296).
_doc: Run with: uv run python -m kosmos.ipc.demo.scripted_chain --scenario specs/2296-ax-mock-adapters/scenarios/citizen-taxreturn.json
_fallback: Used when KOSMOS_FRIENDLI_API_KEY / KOSMOS_FRIENDLI_TOKEN is unavailable (offline / CI). Exercises the same Mock adapters and audit ledger as the LLM-driven path.
description_ko: 국민이 종합소득세 신고를 요청 → verify(modid) → lookup(hometax_simplified) → submit(hometax_taxreturn) → 접수번호 반환
description_en: Citizen files comprehensive income tax return — verify(modid) → lookup(hometax_simplified) → submit(hometax_taxreturn) → receipt number returned

acceptance_criteria.SC-001: Total wall-clock time for all 3 steps < 30s
acceptance_criteria.SC-002: 3 ledger entries appended to ~/.kosmos/memdir/user/consent/<today>.jsonl — one delegation_issued + two delegation_used — all sharing the same delegation_token
acceptance_criteria.SC-007: verify step triggers PermissionRequest flow (even in scripted mode, the adapter's permission_class field is inspected)
